description_long: This is a rectangular stone relief sculpture featuring a bust of a man with curly hair and classical facial features, emerging from a flat, roughly textured slab. The bust is depicted from the chest up, with the figure wearing a draped garment reminiscent of Roman or Renaissance attire. The relief is shallow, with the head and shoulders projecting slightly from the background, while the rest of the slab remains flat and unadorned. The edges of the slab are irregular and rough, suggesting it may have been chiseled from a larger block. The surface is predominantly a pale, weathered gray, with subtle variations in tone and texture. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or additional decorative elements on the sculpture.
description: A rectangular stone relief sculpture of a man's bust with curly hair and classical attire, emerging from a rough, pale slab. The surface is textured and the edges are irregular.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full bust of the man with detailed facial features and draped clothing, set against a flat, rough slab.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the shallow depth of the relief, with the bust projecting only slightly from the flat background.
description_view_2: Alternate frontal view, similar to view 0, with the bust and facial details clearly visible against the textured slab.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the minimal projection of the bust from the slab and the thinness of the relief.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
